title: Where Are the Vibecoded Photoshops?
summary: The article critiques the current state of AI-generated media, arguing that while AI can produce impressive text and code, it struggles with high-quality, photorealistic image editing akin to Photoshop. It suggests that 'vibecoding' (AI-assisted coding) hasn't yet delivered robust, user-friendly tools for complex visual manipulation, highlighting a gap between AI hype and practical creative software.
